title: T-022 — API: WO cancel + reservation release (hard-lock cleanup)
prompt:
Implement Server Action `cancelWorkOrder(wo_id, reason)` per PRD §9.4. Calls wo_state_machine_v1 *→CANCELLED transition (allowed from any non-terminal state, audit logged). Side-effects:
1. For each active wo_material_reservations of this WO with material_source='stock': set released_at=NOW(), released_by=user, release_reason='wo_cancelled'; LP.status returns to 'available'.
2. material_source='upstream_wo_output': zero cleanup (LPs stay available per §9.4 resilience).
3. wo_outputs LPs already materialized stay 'available' for downstream WOs to reuse.
4. Outbox event 'wo.state_changed'.

Reason min 10 chars (audit trail).

RED test asserts release of stock-source reservations, no-op on upstream-source, idempotent re-cancel returns 409.

pipeline_inputs.description: WO cancel with hard-lock reservation release for RM root only; intermediate cascade is zero-cleanup.
pipeline_inputs.details: Reservation release is batch UPDATE WHERE wo_id=? AND released_at IS NULL AND release_reason IS NULL RETURNING lp_id; subsequent UPDATE on license_plates SET status='available' WHERE id IN (...). Both in same transaction. release_reason='wo_cancelled' (V-PLAN-RES-003). reason field stored on wo_status_history.context_jsonb.
out_of_scope: Cancel parent → cancel children prompt (OQ5 — warn-only per §16.3)
acceptance_criteria: Given a WO with 5 reservations (4 stock, 1 fictitiously labeled 'upstream' but excluded from reservation creation), when cancel runs, then 4 reservations have released_at set with reason='wo_cancelled' and 4 LPs return to status='available'.
Given an already CANCELLED WO, when cancel runs again, then HTTP 409 with code 'WO_ALREADY_CANCELLED'.
Given reason='ok' (3 chars), when cancel attempted, then HTTP 400 Zod min length 10.
Given `pnpm vitest run src/server/actions/planning/__tests__/wo-cancel.test.ts`, when run, then 0 failures.
test_strategy: RED tests for batch release, idempotent guard, reason validation, outbox emit.
risk_red_lines: Do not skip release_reason on reservation update — V-PLAN-RES-003.
Do not auto-cancel children — OQ5 resolution: warn-only.
Do not orphan LP.reserved_for_wo_id pointer — must clear during release.
